title: How do you set the symbols value when creating a column via API?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I’m trying to create a new numbers column and set the value of the symbol field via API. I want to use a string like “hours”. Is this possible? 
Thanks in advance!

posts.author: Joel-CG (Joel Ferrer)
